/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -g  -Wall -Wextra -g -O0 CMakeFiles/modbus_tty_simulator.dir/modbus_tty_simulator.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_tty_simulator.dir/modbus_s.c.o -o modbus_tty_simulator   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./:/usr/local/lib:/src/build-native-cm4 ../libneuron-base.so -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.a -ldl -lnng -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lm -lprotobuf-c -lsqlite3 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libxml2.so -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
